\tzpentry{ID4461}{Entry Self-Energy Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4461 introduces Entry Self-Energy Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\Sigma_{\mu\nu} = \left( \nabla_\mu u_\nu + \nabla_\nu u_\mu - \frac{2}{3} (\nabla \cdot u) g_{\mu\nu} \right) \cdot \exp\left( \frac{\Phi_{\text{TZP}}}{P_T} \right) \cdot \chi_T$$
